title: A Straw Hat Refuses to Fall
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on a straw hat refuses to fall, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: A Straw Hat Refuses to Fall. Sanji’s fight with Bon Clay reaches its decisive point as loyalty, deception, and raw strength collide. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Shoot!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: GAHA!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I've finally figured the secret behind your fruit...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Tap...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What!? What're you acting so cheeky about all of a sudden!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Just what is it you think you've figured out about my fruit!?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: You can't use your Okama Kenpou when you're in Nami's body, am I right?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: Of course, I can't attack you either them...

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: But just before you can attack me... You'll always turn back into an okama,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: By touching your face with your left hand...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Gahahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: W-what? What was that again!? J couldn't hear you at all!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Bull's-eye, huh.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Sooooo what!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's just as you said! Without this supple body I've trained everyday,

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: I caaamm't unuusssee my Okama Kenpou! But so what!? You're already in pretty bad shape!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: And on top of that! It's now time for my Okama Kenpou's...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: PRIMA!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: And let me just add this!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: The one on your right is male, while the one on the left is female.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Like I care!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: GAHAHAHA! Well, we'll just see how much you care when you get a taste of 'em!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: Okanna Kenpou-

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=D=D=D=D=D=1

summary: This part develops a straw hat refuses to fall and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
